'''padate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zenithally|zenithally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-d-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zenithally|zenithally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| padate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:padate|padate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:padatesher|padatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padatesherĂ«m|padatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:padatero|padatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:padateshĂ«|padateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padateshĂ«m|padateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipadatero|gokipadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipadateshĂ«|gokipadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadateshĂ«m|gokipadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopadankerom|gopadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopadankeshĂ«|gopadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadankeshĂ«m|gopadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopadankeya|gopadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:padaterom|padaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padatemu|padatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:padateya|padateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipadaterom|gokipadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadatemu|gokipadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipadateya|gokipadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:padadate|padadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:padadatesher|padadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padadatesherĂ«m|padadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:padadatero|padadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:padadateshĂ«|padadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padadateshĂ«m|padadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipadadatero|gokipadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipadadateshĂ«|gokipadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadadateshĂ«m|gokipadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopadadankerom|gopadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopadadankeshĂ«|gopadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadadankeshĂ«m|gopadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopadadankeya|gopadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:padadaterom|padadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padadatemu|padadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:padadateya|padadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipadadaterom|gokipadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadadatemu|gokipadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipadadateya|gokipadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠdĂŠte|pĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠdĂŠtesher|pĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠdĂŠtero|pĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠdĂŠtero|gokipĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠdĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠdĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠdĂŠterom|pĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠdĂŠtemu|pĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠdĂŠteya|pĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠdĂŠterom|gokipĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠdĂŠteya|gokipĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafdafte|pafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafdaftesher|pafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafdaftesherĂ«m|pafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafdaftero|pafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafdafteshĂ«|pafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafdafteshĂ«m|pafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafdaftero|gokipafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafdafteshĂ«|gokipafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafdafteshĂ«m|gokipafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafdafnkerom|gopafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafdafnkeshĂ«|gopafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafdafnkeshĂ«m|gopafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafdafnkeya|gopafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafdafterom|pafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafdaftemu|pafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafdafteya|pafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafdafterom|gokipafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafdaftemu|gokipafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafdafteya|gokipafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
